sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 엘리번스 헬스, 2025년 4분기 영업수익 493억 달러·연간 1,976억 달러, 메디케이드·ACA 비용 압박 속 2026년 조정 EPS 최소 25.50달러 전망

keyPoints.text: 4분기 조정 희석 주당순이익은 3.33달러, 연간 조정 희석 주당순이익은 30.29달러였습니다.
2026년 연간 조정 희석 주당순이익 가이던스를 최소 25.50달러로 제시하고, 2027년 조정 EPS 성장 복귀를 목표로 한다고 밝혔습니다.

riskChanges.text: 4분기 급여비용률이 93.5%로 전년 동기 대비 110포인트 상승했으며, ACA 플랜 의료비 증가와 메디케어 파트D 계절성이 주요 요인이었습니다.

businessChanges.text: CEO는 2026년 가격 규율과 선택적 투자를 통해 다각화된 플랫폼의 수익력을 강화하겠다고 밝혔습니다.
4분기 영업이익률은 0.6%, 연간 기준은 3.6%로 전년 대비 각각 하락했습니다.
연간 영업수익 성장은 헬스베네핏 세그먼트 프리미엄 수율 상승과 메디케어 어드밴티지 회원 증가가 견인했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 4분기 영업수익 493억 달러, 연간 총영업수익 1,976억 달러를 달성했습니다.
연간 GAAP 희석 주당순이익은 25.21달러, 조정 희석 주당순이익은 30.29달러였습니다.
연간 급여비용률은 90.0%로 전년 대비 150포인트 상승하며 수익성 압박이 확대됐습니다.

watchItems.text: ACA 및 메디케이드 의료비 증가 추세 지속 여부가 2026년 마진 회복의 핵심 변수입니다.
경영진이 제시한 2027년 조정 EPS 성장 복귀를 위한 가격 규율과 비용 통제 실행력이 주목 포인트입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a4q2025elvearningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document E A R N I N G S R E L E A S E ELEVANCE HEALTH REPORTS FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR 2025 RESULTS; SETS FULL YEAR 2026 OUTLOOK • 4Q 2025 operating revenue of $49.3 billion; FY 2025 of $197.6 billion • 4Q 2025 diluted EPS 1 of $2.47; adjusted diluted EPS 2 of $3.33 • FY 2025 diluted EPS 1 of $25.21; adjusted diluted EPS 2 of $30.29 • Projected FY 2026 GAAP diluted EPS 1 to be at least $22.30 • Projected FY 2026 adjusted diluted EPS 2 to be at least $25.50 • Returned $4.1 billion of capital to shareholders in 2025 • Reaffirming long-term earnings algorithm; recalibrating segment margin targets Indianapolis, IN - January 28, 2026 - Elevance Health, Inc. (NYSE: ELV) reported fourth  Normalized numeric aliases: $49.3 billion = 493억 달러; $197.6 billion = 1,976억 달러; $4.1 billion = 41억 달러; $49.3 = 49.3달러; $197.6 = 197.6달러; $2.47 = 2.47달러; $3.33 = 3.33달러; $25.21 = 25.21달러; $22.30 = 22.30달러; $30.29 = 30.29달러; $25.50 = 25.50달러; $4.1 = 4.1달러.

environment. As we enter 2026, our focus is on advancing affordability and making healthcare easier to access and navigate for the members we serve. Through pricing discipline and targeted investments, we are strengthening the earnings power of our diversified platform and remain confident in our ability to return to at least 12% adjusted EPS growth in 2027." Gail K. Boudreaux President and Chief Executive Officer 1. Earnings per diluted share ("EPS"). 2. Operating revenue was $49.3 billion in the fourth quarter of 2025, an increase of $4.3 billion, or 10 percent compared  Normalized numeric aliases: $49.3 billion = 493억 달러; $4.3 billion = 43억 달러; $197.6 billion = 1,976억 달러; $22.4 billion = 224억 달러; $7.5 = 7.5달러; $9.3 = 9.3달러; $49.3 = 49.3달러; $4.3 = 4.3달러; $22.4 = 22.4달러; $197.6 = 197.6달러; 10 percent = 10%; 13 percent = 13%.

and year was driven by higher premium yields in our Health Benefits segment, contributions from acquisitions, and growth in Medicare Advantage membership, partially offset by membership attrition in our Medicaid business. The benefit expense ratio was 93.5 percent in the fourth quarter, an increase of 110 basis points compared to the prior year period, reflecting higher medical cost trend primarily in our Affordable Care Act health plans and heightened Medicare Part D seasonality driven by Inflation Reduction Act changes. For the year, our benefit expense ratio was 90.0 percent, an increase of 150 basis points year over year, driven by elevated medical cost trends. Days in Claims Payable was 41.3 days as of December 31, 2025, a decrease of 0.1 days from September 30, 2025, and a decrease of 1.9 days compared to December 31, 2024.
